seoTitle: Kunwarara vs Kuranda — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kunwarara and Kuranda. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kunwarara and Kuranda.
heading: Kunwarara vs Kuranda — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kunwarara, Queensland and Kuranda, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kuranda has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Kunwarara (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kunwarara or Kuranda safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kunwarara has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Kuranda scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kunwarara scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Kuranda scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kunwarara or Kuranda?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kuranda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
